What we do

End-to-end consumer promotions, from code generation to reward redemption.

Consumer promotions are complex. A pack leaves the factory with a unique code, a shopper scans it weeks later, and within seconds they need validation, a reward, and a receipt. Promo Cloud is the platform that makes this work reliably, at FMCG scale, across every touchpoint a consumer might use.

#

Code generation & printing

Serialised, cryptographically secure unique codes generated at scale and handed to your pack printer. Compatible with inkjet, laser, and pre-printed scratch panels.

✓

Real-time validation

Anti-fraud checks on every scan: code validity, redemption caps, geo-eligibility, velocity checks, KYC where applicable.

₹

Instant reward disbursal

Direct UPI cashback, EGVs, digital vouchers, physical merchandise, sweepstakes entries. Partner integrations with Amazon, Zomato, Nykaa, and more.

◉

Multi-touchpoint delivery

Microsite, WhatsApp chatbot, SMS, mobile app, scratch cards, spin wheels. Choose the UX that fits your audience and geography.

⚡

Gamification layers

Spin-the-wheel, digital scratch cards, AR experiences, leaderboards, streak mechanics. Drive repeat engagement beyond single-scan.

📊

Campaign analytics

Live dashboards showing scans, redemptions, geo breakdown, reward utilisation, fraud flags. Export-ready for your brand team and agency.

The consumer journey, end to end
From pack production to reward in wallet. Typical turnaround: under 60 seconds on the happy path.
1

Pack produced

Unique code printed on pack or under flap during manufacturing.

→
2

Shopper buys

Consumer picks up the pack at GT, MT or e-com channel.

→
3

Scan / SMS / enter code

Consumer engages via QR microsite, WhatsApp, or SMS shortcode.

→
4

Validate & reward

Code checked, consumer registered, reward logic triggered.

→
5

Receive & redeem

UPI credit, voucher code, sweepstakes entry, or physical shipment.

Platform architecture

A purpose-built stack for high-volume consumer promotions.

Five layers working together, each replaceable and auditable. Your brand team sees a clean console, your agency sees reporting, your IT sees enterprise-grade APIs.

Consumer experience
Microsite, chatbot, SMS, WhatsApp flows, mobile app, scratch card, spin wheel, AR. All rendered responsively, works on 2G.
UX Layer
Engagement mechanics
Gamification engine, leaderboards, streaks, referrals, avatar creation, social share. Configurable per campaign.
Mechanics
Validation & fraud
Code resolver, velocity checks, geo-fencing, KYC, device fingerprinting, bot detection, duplicate prevention.
Trust Layer
Reward orchestration
Randomizer, prize pool management, wallet integrations (UPI), voucher APIs (Amazon, Zomato, Nykaa), physical fulfilment.
Rewards
Code generation & data
Serialised unique codes, SKU-level segmentation, batch management, integration with pack printers, warehouse of scans and redemptions.
Foundation
Campaign mechanics

Five proven mechanic patterns, each tuned for a different brand goal.

Not every campaign needs a spin wheel. The best mechanic is the one that matches your KPI, your budget, your audience, and your channel mix. Here are the patterns we've run most, with examples.

Assured Reward

8 campaigns · highest volume

Every valid code wins. Best for trial, frictionless completion, and high redemption rates. The fastest way to convert a scan into brand love.

PurinaITC ClassmateBritannia Marie GoldNesteaGladeSunrajaMunch MahaBauli

Gamified

5 campaigns · buzz & PR

Add a game layer between scan and reward. Spin wheels, AR experiences, mini-games. Drives social shareability and dwell time with the brand.

Ganguly MeetPolo SneakersCadbury ChoclairsMunch IPLBauli

Lucky Draw / Sweepstakes

5 campaigns · mass reach

Big prize, lottery-based winner selection. Ideal for festive moments, high-value partner tie-ins, and PR-led campaigns with earned media potential.

Fortune HoliNilon'sMilkybar MovieFreedom OilCremica

Points & Leaderboard

1 campaign · repeat purchase

Stack scans over time, climb a leaderboard, unlock tier rewards. Built for repeat-purchase categories and collector audiences (kids, candy, snacks).

Cadbury Lolly (March 2026 launch)

Invoice Upload

1 campaign · MT channel

For SKUs without codes or MT-only activations. Shopper uploads their bill, OCR extracts line items, reward triggered on qualifying basket value.

Godrej Aer (MT Channel)

Hybrid / Multi-stage

Custom builds

Combine assured + lucky draw, or gamified + points. Most of our largest campaigns use hybrid mechanics to balance guaranteed delight with aspirational prize hooks.

Sunraja (Assured + Mega)KitKat (ROI + TN split)
Touchpoints

Meet shoppers where they already are.

Every audience is different. Kids scan QRs, aunties reply to SMS, teens chat with bots. Promo Cloud supports the full range of consumer touchpoints, each tuned for its channel.

📱

Microsite

QR-led, mobile-first web flow. Default for most campaigns.

💬

WhatsApp Bot

Conversational flows for low-literacy and regional audiences.

✉️

SMS

Batch-code campaigns, no-data geographies, RCS-ready.

🎲

Spin the Wheel

Built-in gamification module. Configurable prize slots.

🎴

Digital Scratch

Scratch-card mechanic, reveal-on-drag interaction.

🎯

AR Experiences

Camera-based games (see Munch IPL gully cricket).

🧾

Invoice OCR

Bill upload with line-item extraction for non-coded campaigns.

🏆

Leaderboard

Live ranking, tier badges, streak mechanics.

Reward constructs

From ₹5 cashback to a ticket to the Chocolate Factory.

We support the full spectrum of reward types, from instant digital gratification to aspirational physical experiences. Pick what fits your budget and brand position.

UPI Cashback
Direct credit to shopper's UPI ID within seconds of redemption. Most popular reward in our portfolio.
Purina · Sunraja · Ganguly
Digital Vouchers
Partner EGVs from Amazon, Zomato, Nykaa, Flipkart. High perceived value, low cost to brand.
Nestea · Glade · ITC Classmate
Physical Rewards
Branded merchandise, partner products, limited-edition collabs. Logistics handled end-to-end.
Polo × Souled Store · Munch IPL
Sweepstakes
Mega prizes with lucky-draw mechanic. Gold coins, vacations, celebrity meets, branded experiences.
Fortune · KitKat · Ganguly · Cadbury Lolly
Tiered / Streak Rewards
Escalating prizes by number of scans. Drives repeat purchase and shopper investment in the campaign.
Cadbury Lolly (Ticket to Chocolate Factory)
Channel Incentives
Dual rewards: retailer and consumer both get paid on validation. Drives in-store advocacy.
Purina (UPI to both)
Featured campaign

The flagship launch of 2026.

Our newest campaign with Cadbury, going live 1 March 2026. Points-and-leaderboard mechanic with an aspirational physical prize, built from the ground up on Promo Cloud.

● Going live · 1 March 2026

Cadbury Lolly
Ticket to Chocolate Factory

The first points-based on-pack campaign in the Indian confectionery category. Kids stack unique codes across Lolly pack purchases, climb a live leaderboard, and unlock assured gift cards plus a sweepstakes entry for an immersive Chocolate Factory experience.

Mechanic
Points + Leaderboard
Platform
Microsite
Geo
PAN India
Audience
Kids 6-14

Why Promo Cloud

Built by Pine Labs. Proven with India's best brands.

Consumer promotions look simple until you run one at FMCG scale. Here's why leading brands pick Promo Cloud over building in-house or stitching agencies together.

01

Pine Labs rails

UPI disbursal at India's biggest payments platform. Same rails that process billions in merchant transactions, now powering your consumer rewards.

02

FMCG-native

Purpose-built for on-pack promos, not a repurposed CRM. TN regulatory splits, SKU-level codes, MT vs GT mechanics, it's all in the DNA.

03

Fast to launch

Most campaigns go live in 4-6 weeks from brief. Reusable mechanic templates mean your agency isn't reinventing the wheel on every brief.

04

Fraud-resistant

Five layers of anti-fraud: velocity, geo, device, behaviour, KYC. Protected billions in campaign budgets across our deployments.

05

One partner, full stack

Code gen, print integration, UX, validation, rewards, analytics. No agency-vendor-fulfilment handoffs. One contract, one throat to choke.

06

Agency-friendly

Your creative agency keeps creative. We handle the plumbing. White-label consoles, export-ready reports, API access for your partners.

Ready to run your next promo on Promo Cloud?

Tell us about your brand, your category, and your next launch window. We'll come back within 48 hours with a mechanic recommendation, timeline, and rough commercials.
